justification: All pass criteria met: timeout mismatch clearly identified with exact math (1150ms vs 500ms), orphaned downstream request consequence thoroughly described (wasted work, held connections, thread consumption), outbound > inbound timeout relationship explicitly called out, multiple remediation options provided (parallelization, timeout renegotiation, aggressive outbound timeouts, context cancellation), and verdict is NOT READY.

observations.text: Exceptional timeout math breakdown with clear arithmetic showing 1150ms vs 500ms deficit
Step-by-step production scenario walkthrough showing exactly how orphaned requests manifest
Identified that even p50 latency (~575ms) exceeds the 500ms budget — goes beyond what rubric requires
Five distinct remediation options provided with prioritization (P0/P1/P2), well exceeding the two-option minimum
Correctly noted that adding retries would worsen the situation given current timeout math
Identified thread pool exhaustion risk from 3000ms worst-case sequential processing
Appropriate escalation routing to MJ for architecture and Bird for domain decisions on partial enrichment
Minor: emoji usage in verdict header, though this is cosmetic
